channel.title: NARW Cross, KN Agans, AN Prasad, V Borisevich, C Woolsey, DJ Deer, NS Dobias, JB Geisbert, KA Fenton, TW Geisbert | PlatCOVID

image.title: NARW Cross, KN Agans, AN Prasad, V Borisevich, C Woolsey, DJ Deer, NS Dobias, JB Geisbert, KA Fenton, TW Geisbert

item.title: Intranasal exposure of African green monkeys to SARS-CoV-2 results in acute phase pneumonia with shedding and lung injury still present in the early convalescence phase.
